ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" TEXT /* Dividend yield percentage */,
  "beta" TEXT /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "52_week_high" TEXT /* 52-week high price */,
  "52_week_low" TEXT /* 52-week low price */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adjusted_close_price" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price to account for splits and dividends */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" TEXT /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded during the day */,
  "change_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., API, exchange) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "total_value" TEXT /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "total_profit_loss" TEXT /* Total profit or loss of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the portfolio was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current value of the holding */,
  "profit_loss" TEXT /* Profit or loss of the holding */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the holding was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" TEXT /* Value at which the alert should trigger */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, canceled) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the alert is active */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, trend analysis) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date the report was last accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock traded */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price at which the transaction was executed */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was executed */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission charged for the transaction */,
  "transaction_fees" TEXT /* Total fees for the transaction */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of the order (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the watchlist was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist item */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last date the stock was checked in the watchlist */,
  "note" TEXT /* User's note about the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
